summary: FASE 1 testing completed successfully. All new features working: Dashboard Centro de Mando with 4 sections (HOY TENGO QUE HACER ESTO, BLOQUEOS, APROBACIONES PENDIENTES, PAGOS A REVISAR), auto-priority system, new task statuses, task filters, and ¿Qué hago hoy? button.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with info@victoriaeventos.com / Victoria2024 - 200 OK
Backend: /api/dashboard/command-center returns all 5 sections (hoy, bloqueos, aprobaciones, pagos_revisar, que_hago_hoy)
Backend: HOY section returns max 6 tasks with priority colors
Backend: PAGOS A REVISAR returns budget items with remaining amounts in euros
Backend: Tasks have auto-calculated priority (alta/media/baja)
Backend: Tasks have normalized status values (pendiente, en_proceso, esperando_cliente, esperando_proveedor, aprobacion_pendiente, completada)
Backend: Task status update works correctly
Backend: Overdue tasks get 'alta' priority
Backend: Completed tasks get 'baja' priority
UI: Dashboard shows Centro de Mando with all 4 sections
UI: HOY TENGO QUE HACER ESTO shows max 6 tasks with red priority dots
UI: BLOQUEOS section visible (empty when no blocked tasks)
UI: APROBACIONES PENDIENTES section visible
UI: PAGOS A REVISAR shows budget items with euro amounts (1595€, 1500€)
UI: ¿Qué hago hoy? button opens dialog with top 3 tasks
UI: Event navigation works (Gema y Jose Luis)
UI: Tasks tab shows all 6 filter buttons (Todas, Hoy, Esta semana, Vencidas, Esperando, Aprobaciones)
UI: Vencidas filter shows only overdue tasks (18 tasks)
UI: Tasks show priority indicator (red border-left for alta)
UI: Tasks show status badges (Pendiente, Vencida, Esperando cliente, etc.)
UI: Status change dropdown shows all 6 status options
UI: Status change to 'Esperando cliente' works and persists
UI: Esperando filter shows tasks with waiting statuses
UI: ¿Qué hago hoy? button in tasks view opens dialog
UI: Edit task form shows Estado dropdown with all 6 status options
critical_code_review_comments: calculate_priority function properly handles overdue, waiting states, and future tasks
command-center endpoint correctly filters out completed tasks
Status normalization (pending→pendiente, completed→completada) working in tasks endpoint
Frontend TasksModule correctly implements all 6 filters with proper logic
Priority colors (red/amber/green) properly applied via border-l classes
Status dropdown in both inline and edit form shows all 6 options
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 1 fully tested and working. Dashboard has Centro de Mando with 4 sections. Tasks have 6 new statuses (pendiente, en_proceso, esperando_cliente, esperando_proveedor, aprobacion_pendiente, completada). Auto-priority: overdue=alta(red), 3 days=media(yellow), future=baja(green), waiting>3days=alta. Task filters: Todas, Hoy, Esta semana, Vencidas, Esperando, Aprobaciones. data-testid attributes: que-hago-hoy-btn (dashboard), que-hago-btn (tasks), filter-{key}, status-select-{task.id}, task-card-{task.id}. Real data: 3 events, ~99 tasks, many overdue tasks showing alta priority.
